index.title: Mai fassarar albarkatu
index.description: Mai fassarar Albarkatu yana buɗe buƙatun jawo na'ura don fayilolin albarkatun ku a kowane repo, a kowane tsari - wanda Azure AI Translator, AWS Translate, ko Google Cloud Translation ke sarrafawa.
index.socialTitle: Resource Translator — fassara fayilolin albarkatu ta atomatik
index.badge: v3.0 — Azure, AWS & Google providers, Node 24, repo config
index.lede: Mai fassarar albarkatu yana buɗe buƙatun jawo na'ura don fayilolin albarkatun ku ta amfani da Azure, AWS, ko Google - aiki ɗaya mai haɗin kai, mai ba da sabis ɗaya a kowane gudu, SDKs na hukuma a ƙarƙashin murfin.
index.builtForShipping: An gina shi don jigilar kaya
index.workflowTitle: Fassarar a matsayin aikin aiki, ba aikin aiki ba.
index.workflowBody: Sauke aikin a cikin CI ɗinku na yanzu, nuna shi a Azure, AWS, ko Google, kuma bari repo ɗinku yayi magana da kowane yare da kuka yi niyya.

formatNotes.json: Ba tare da wata matsala ba ko kuma mai tsabta

formats.title: Tsarin fayil shida
formats.body: Zagaye {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, da {restext} tare da tsarin byte.

config.title: Repo-level config
config.body: Sauke fayil ɗin {configPath} don haɗawa da globs, glossaries, da nau'ikan masu fassara na al'ada.

glossary.title: Glossary-aware
glossary.body: Kulle sunayen alama da sharuɗɗan samfura tare da regex mai kaifin baki wanda ke kula da {cpp}, {dotnet}, da abokai.

dryRun.title: Dry Run + Soft-Fail
dryRun.body: Preview fassarar ba tare da rubuta fayiloli ba, ko nuna kowane kuskure a matsayin gargadi yayin da kake maimaitawa.

outputs.title: PR-friendly outputs
outputs.body: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, da kuma {hasNewTranslations} kai tsaye a cikin create-jawo-request.

sdk.title: Azure, AWS & Google
sdk.body: Zaɓi mai ba da sabis ɗaya a kowane gudu. Kowannensu yana motsa shi ta hanyar SDK na hukuma ({azureSdk}, {awsSdk}, {googleSdk}) tare da sake gwadawa ta atomatik a kan {statusCodes} - babu HTTP da aka mirgine da hannu. {esbuild}-bundled, audit-tsabta.

workflowPreview.body: Sirri uku, layi huɗu, kuma repo ɗinku yana da harsuna da yawa a turawa na gaba.
workflowPreview.setupLink: Yi tafiya ta hanyar cikakken saitin

cta.title: Shirye don yin amfani da autopilot?
cta.body: Maɓallin mai ba da sabis ɗaya - Azure, AWS, ko Google - da fayil ɗin aiki ɗaya. Resource Translator yana kula da sauran.

getting-started.title: Farawa
getting-started.lede: Ƙara fayil ɗin aiki, nuna shi a takaddun shaidar mai fassarar Azure AI, kuma aikin zai bincika repo don fayilolin albarkatun harshe na tushe kuma ya fitar da 'yan uwan da aka fassara.

provision.title: Samar da kayan aikin Azure AI Translator
provision.body: Ƙirƙirar albarkatun mai fassara na Azure AI a cikin tashar Azure, sannan adana waɗannan azaman asirin ajiyar GitHub don aikin zai iya karanta su:
provision.key: Maɓallin Biyan kuɗi don Kayan T

resource.title: Shigar da fayil ɗin tushen tushen
resource.body: Fayilolin albarkatu suna amfani da yarjejeniyar {namingConvention}. Alal misali, {sourceFile} ya zama {frFile}, {deFile}, da sauransu bayan gudu.

output.title: Duba fitarwa
output.body: Da zarar aikin ya ƙare, aikin ya fallasa fitarwa guda uku da zaku iya waya a cikin bayanin PR: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, da {hasNewTranslations}. Har ila yau, yana rubuta taƙaitaccen bayani a cikin shafin aikin ta hanyar {coreSummary}.

nextSteps.title: Matakai na gaba
nextSteps.configuration: Saita kuskuren matakin repo tare da {configPath}.
nextSteps.recipes: Duba girke-girke don monorepos, ƙamus na al'ada, da nau'ikan masu fassara na al'ada.

providers.title: Masu ba da fassara
providers.lede: Zaɓi mai ba da fassara guda ɗaya a kowane gudu - Azure AI Translator, AWS Translate, ko Google Cloud Translation - a bayan ɗaya, haɗin API mai haɗin kai. Mai fassara yana nuna hali iri ɗaya ba tare da la'akari da mai ba da sabis ba; kawai takardun shaida sun bambanta.
providers.backwardCompatible: Cikakken jituwa a baya: {provider} tsoho zuwa {azure}, don haka ayyukan Azure na yanzu suna ci gaba da aiki ba tare da canzawa ba - babu gyare-gyare da ake buƙata.

selecting.title: Zaɓin mai ba da sabis
selecting.body: Saita shigarwar {provider} zuwa {azure} (tsoho), {aws}, ko {google}, sa'an nan kuma samar da takardun shaidar wannan mai bayarwa. Ana amfani da mai ba da sabis ɗaya kawai a kowane kiran aiki; aikin yana ƙayyade zuwa SDK mai dacewa a bayan masana'anta.

aws.name: Fassarar AWS
aws.credentials: OIDC / sarkar tsoho, ko awsAccessKeyId + awsSecretAccessKeyKey; awsRegion

google.name: Fassarar Google Cloud
google.credentials: googleApiKey OR googleCredentials (asusun sabis na JSON)

azure.title: Azure AI Translator (tsoho)
azure.body: Mai ba da sabis na tsoho. Samar da kayan aikin mai fassara na Azure AI kuma wuce {subscriptionKey}, {endpoint}, da zaɓi {region}. Wannan shi ne tsarin da aka riga aka yi amfani da shi a yanzu.

aws.title: Fassarar AWS
aws.body: Yi amfani da {sdk}. Zaɓi OIDC ta hanyar {configureAwsCredentials} don haka ba a adana sirri na dogon lokaci ba - aikin yana karanta sarkar takardun shaida ta AWS SDK. A madadin haka, wuce {awsAccessKeyId} kuma {awsSecretAccessKey} a bayyane. Ana buƙatar yanki koyaushe, ta hanyar {awsRegion} ko {awsRegionEnv} yanayin yanayi.
aws.keysNote: Don amfani da maɓallan tsayayye maimakon OIDC, sauke matakin {configureAwsCredentials} kuma wuce {awsAccessKeyId} / {awsSecretAccessKey} (ta hanyar {secrets}) da {awsRegion}.

google.title: Fassarar Google Cloud
google.body: Yi amfani da {sdk} (v2). Tabbatar da ko dai maɓallin API ({googleApiKey}) ko takaddun shaidar JSON na asusun sabis ({googleCredentials}). Samar da daidai daya; Ana samun zaɓi {googleProjectId} daga takardun shaida idan aka cire shi.

mapping.title: Taswirar taswirar niyya
mapping.body: An tsara ƙayyadaddun ƙayyadaddun ƙa Duk sauran abubuwa sun koma ga kuskure mai ma'ana don haka halayyar ta kasance daidai.
mapping.caption: Taswirar taswirar niyya a duk faɗin masu samarwa

textType.aws: An yi watsi da shi (babu toggle)

locales.title: Lambobin yanki sun bambanta da mai ba da sabis
locales.body: Kowane mai ba da sabis yana amfani da lambobin yanki na kansa (misali Sinanci mai sauƙi yana {azureCode} akan Azure, {awsCode} akan AWS, da {googleCode} akan Google). Lambobin suna wucewa kamar yadda yake kuma suna fitar da sunayen fayil ɗin fitarwa, don haka zaɓi ƙimar da {toLocales} zaɓa mai ba da sabis ɗin da kuka zaɓa ke tallafawa.

configuration.title: Daidaitawa
configuration.lede: Bayyana tsoho sau ɗaya a cikin fayil ɗin saitin ma'ajiya kuma bari kowane aiki ya gaji su. Abubuwan da aka yi amfani da su koyaushe suna cin nasara lokacin da aka samar da duka biyun.
configuration.intro: Yi amfani da hanyar tare da shigarwar {configPath} idan kana buƙatar wurin da ba na tsoho ba.

fields.sourceLocale: Komawa zuwa maɓallin {sourceLocale} idan ba a saita shi ba. Har ila yau, an tura shi zuwa ga mai fassara kamar yadda {fromLocale} don haka ba a gano gajerun igiyoyi ta atomatik.
fields.toLocales: Ko dai wani nau'i na nau'i
fields.includeExclude: Tsarin Glob da aka kimanta akan cikakkiyar hanyoyin da ke da alaƙa da wurin aiki.
fields.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — your industry/domain knob (shari'a, likitanci, sautin tallace-tallace, da sauransu). An aika shi a matsayin {categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Rashin daidaituwa ga {plain}. Yi amfani da {html} ne kawai idan darajar albarkatun ka sun ƙunshi gutsutsuren HTML na ainihi.
fields.profanityAction: Ta yaya za a bi da kalmomin da ba su dace ba a cikin fassarar fassarar?
fields.allowFallback: Saita zuwa {false} don gazawa fassarar lokacin da {categoryId} ka ba shi da ƙaddamar da wurin da aka yi niyya maimakon komawa zuwa samfurin gama gari.
fields.apiVersion: Translator REST API version. Rashin daidaituwa ga {version}.
fields.maxRetries: Matsakaicin ƙoƙari na sake gwadawa akan amsoshin HTTP na wucin gadi ({statusCodes}). Rashin daidaituwa ga {defaultRetries}. Jimlar kiran HTTP a kowace buƙata {totalCalls}.
fields.retryBackoffMs: Cap (ms) a kan kowane barci na baya. Rashin daidaituwa ga {defaultBackoff}. Ana girmama rubutun {retryAfter} na Azure daidai lokacin da yake nan; in ba haka ba ana amfani da jittered exponential backoff, wanda aka rufe a wannan darajar.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Rashin daidaituwa ga {true}. Lokacin da aka kunna, alamu kamar {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} da HTML ana maye gurbin su da alamun sentinel kafin fassara kuma an dawo da su daga baya. Kashe ne kawai idan tushen da gangan ya ƙunshi zahiri mai siffar placeholder.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Ƙarin alamun regex (ba tare da ƙayyadaddun ƙayyadaddun ba) an ƙara su zuwa saitin mai riƙe wuri na asali, misali {angleToken} don ƙididdigar alamar al'ada. An yi watsi da regexes marasa inganci.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Tsarin Glob ya dace da maɓallan matakin parser (hanyar JSON, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF naúrar {xliffId}, INI / restext key). Ana sauke maɓallan da suka dace daga buƙata kuma suna wucewa tare da ƙimar tushen su da aka kiyaye su.

steps.actionInputs: Aikin yana karanta bayyananniyar shigarwa daga aikin aiki.
steps.precedence: Ga kowane filin da aka raba, shigarwar ta ci nasara; in ba haka ba, ana amfani da darajar YAML.
steps.validation: An tabbatar da dabi'un da aka haɗa. Abubuwan da ba su da inganci (misali {invalidEnum}) suna haifar da aikin ya gaza da sauri tare da bayyananniyar saƙo.

tone.heading: Tone da masana'antu, a bayyane yake
tone.body: Azure AI Translator v3 API ba shi da maɓallin sauti guda ɗaya. Saitin biyu sun haɗu don ba ku mafi yawan sarrafawa iri ɗaya:
tone.industryBody: Yi amfani da {categoryId} don nuna rukunin Azure {customTranslatorLink} da aka horar da shi a kan jikin ku - shari'a, fasaha, likitanci, tallace-tallace, ko wani abu. Wannan shine mafi ƙarfin ƙarfi don sauti, muryar alama, da ƙamus.
tone.surfaceBody: Yi amfani da {glossaryLink} don kulle sunayen alama da sharuɗɗan samfura a kalma, kuma yi amfani da {profanityAction} don goge sharuɗɗa marasa kyau yayin niyya ga yanki ga matasa masu sauraro.

inputs.title: Abubuwan shigarwa da fitarwa
inputs.lede: Hakanan ana karɓar kowane shigarwa a cikin fayil ɗin zaɓi na repo. Lokacin da aka saita duka biyun, shigar da aikin ya ci nasara.
inputs.configurationIntro: Duba {configurationLink} don tsarin YAML da umarnin lodawa.

items.sourceLocale: Source locale (misali {en}) da aka yi amfani da su don nemo fayilolin albarkatu kamar {sourceGlob}. Hakanan an aika shi zuwa ga mai ba da sabis kamar yadda {fromLocale}.

providerInputs.heading: Zaɓin mai ba da sabis da takaddun shaida
providerInputs.caption: Zaɓin mai ba da sabis da takaddun shaida na kowane mai siyarwa
providerInputs.intro: Zaɓi mai ba da sabis ɗaya a kowane gudu tare da {provider}. Samar da takardun shaidar mai ba da sabis da aka zaɓa ne kawai — duba jagorar {providersLink} don cikakken saiti.

items.provider: Mai ba da sabis na fassara: {azure} (tsoho), {aws}, ko {google}. Ana amfani da mai ba da sabis ɗaya ne kawai a kowane kiran aiki.
items.subscriptionKey: Azure AI Translator subscription key. Abin da ake buƙata don {azure}. Wucewa ta hanyar {secrets}.
items.endpoint: Azure Translator endpoint URL, misali {endpointUrl}. Abin da ake buƙata don {azure}.
items.awsAccessKeyId: AWS access key id. Zaɓi - cire (tare da {awsSecretAccessKey}) don amfani da sarkar takardun shaida ta AWS / OIDC. Wucewa ta hanyar {secrets}.
items.awsSecretAccessKey: Maɓallin Samun Sirri na AWS Dole ne a samar da shi tare da {awsAccessKeyId}. Wucewa ta hanyar {secrets}.
items.awsSessionToken: Zaɓi na zaɓi na zaman AWS don takaddun shaida na wucin gadi. Wucewa ta hanyar {secrets}.
items.awsRegion: Yankin AWS don sabis na fassara (misali {regionExample}) Ana buƙatar {aws} sai dai idan an saita {awsRegionEnv} a cikin muhalli.
items.googleApiKey: Maɓallin API na Google Cloud Bayar da wannan KO {googleCredentials} don {google}. Wucewa ta hanyar {secrets}.
items.googleCredentials: Maɓallin asusun sabis na Google Cloud a matsayin igiyar JSON. Bayar da wannan KO {googleApiKey} don {google}. Wucewa ta hanyar {secrets}.
items.googleProjectId: Zaɓin Google Cloud project id. Yawanci ana yin la'akari da shi daga takaddun shaida na asusun sabis.

optionalInputs.heading: Abubuwan da aka saba amfani da su na yau da kullun
optionalInputs.caption: Abubuwan da aka saba amfani da su na yau da kullun

items.region: Translator resource region (omit for global resources).
items.toLocales: Yankunan da za a fassara zuwa Ya karɓi jerin JSON ({jsonArray}) ko dabi'un da aka raba da comma.
items.include: Newline-raba glob alamu; Fayilolin da suka dace ne kawai ake fassara.
items.exclude: Newline-raba glob alamu; An tsallake fayilolin da suka dace (an yi amfani da su bayan sun haɗa).
items.configPath: Hanyar zuwa fayil ɗin ƙididdigar YAML (dangane da tushen wurin aiki).
items.dryRun: Lokacin da {true}, gudanar da fassarar kuma fitar da taƙaitaccen bayani amma kar ka rubuta fayiloli.
items.failOnError: Lokacin da {true}, kuskuren da ba zato ba tsammani ya kasa aiki; Lokacin da {false}, kurakurai suna gargaɗi.

translatorInputs.heading: Azure Translator request inputs
translatorInputs.intro: Waɗannan taswirar kai tsaye zuwa sigogin tambaya na Azure AI Translator v3 kuma suna amfani da mai ba da sabis na azure. textType da lalata Action kuma an taswirar su zuwa AWS / Google inda kwatankwacin ya wanzu (duba jagorar masu samarwa); sauran su ne azure-kawai. Kowane ɗayan zaɓi ne; Kuskuren fassara yana aiki lokacin da ba a saita shi ba.
translatorInputs.caption: Azure Translator request inputs

items.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — the industry/domain/tone knob. An tura shi kamar yadda {categoryQuery}.
items.textType: {plain} ko {html}. Yi amfani da {html} ne kawai lokacin da ƙimar albarkatun ka na ainihi ne.
items.profanityAction: {noAction}, {marked}, ko {deleted}. Yana sarrafa yadda ake fitar da kalmomin lalata a cikin fassarar.
items.profanityMarker: {asterisk} ko {tag}. Ma'ana ne kawai lokacin da {profanityAction} {marked}.
items.allowFallback: Lokacin da {false}, Mai fassara ya dawo da kuskure maimakon komawa zuwa tsarin gaba ɗaya idan {categoryId} ɗinku ba shi da ƙaddamar da wurin da aka yi niyya.

resilienceInputs.heading: Resilience & placeholder kariya
resilienceInputs.intro: Waɗannan shigarwar suna sarrafa yadda aikin ke aiki lokacin da Mai fassara ya ƙunshi buƙatarku da kuma yadda yake kare alamun riƙe wuri kamar {mustache} ko {indexZero} daga ɓarna yayin fassara.
resilienceInputs.caption: Resilience da placeholder kariya inputs

items.maxRetries: Matsakaicin ƙoƙari na sake gwadawa akan amsoshin HTTP na wucin gadi ({statusCodes}). Jimlar adadin kiran HTTP a kowace buƙata {totalCalls}.
items.retryBackoffMs: Rufe (a cikin milliseconds) a kan kowane bacci na baya. Aikin yana girmama taken amsa na {retryAfter} na Azure daidai lokacin da yake nan; in ba haka ba yana amfani da jittered exponential backoff rufe a wannan darajar.
items.protectPlaceholders: Lokacin da aka {true} (tsoho), masu riƙe da wurare kamar {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} da HTML ana maye gurbin su da alamun sentinel kafin fassarar kuma an dawo da su daga baya. Kashe ne kawai idan tushen ka da gangan ya ƙunshi rubutun mai siffar wuri wanda ya kamata a fassara.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Newline-rarrabuwa regexes (ba tare da delimiters ba) ƙara zuwa tsoho placeholder saiti, misali {angleToken} ga al'ada alama syntax.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Tsarin glob na Newline da aka raba ya dace da maɓallan matakin parser (hanyar JSON dotted hanya, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF naúrar {xliffId}, INI / restext key). Ana sauke maɓallan da suka dace daga buƙatar Mai fassara kuma suna wucewa tare da ƙimar asalin su.

items.summaryDetails: Taƙaitaccen bayani na Markdown ya dace da jikin PR ko taƙaitaccen aiki.
items.hasNewTranslations: {trueString} lokacin da aka samar da ɗaya ko fiye da sababbin fassarar.

formats.title: Tsarin fayil
formats.heroTitle: Tsarin fayil ɗin da aka goyi bayan
formats.lede: Tsarin albarkatun zagaye guda shida. Aikin yana karanta kowane fayil ɗin tushe, yana fassara dabi'u, kuma yana rubuta ɗan'uwa a kowane yanki da aka yi niyya.
formats.namingConvention: Dukkan fayilolin suna amfani da yarjejeniyar {namingConvention} suna da kyau.

resx.blurb: XML-tushen .NET albarkatun fayiloli. Fassara rubutun ciki na kowane {dataValue} node, adana comments da metadata.

xliff.blurb: OASIS XLIFF 2.0 takardu. Fassara kowane {source} kuma rubuta sakamako a cikin {target} da ta dace, saita {trgLang} don yankin.

po.blurb: GNU gettext Portable Object files. Fassara kowane {msgid} / {msgidPlural} a cikin siffofin {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural}.

json.blurb: Fayilolin JSON na yau da kullun. Abubuwan da aka shimfiɗa suna shimfiɗa tare da {delimiter} delimiter don fassara, sa'an nan kuma sake yin nested a kan fitarwa. An kiyaye maɓallan maɓalli ({dottedKey}) a cikin kalma.

ini.blurb: Fayilolin {keyValue} masu sauƙi (Win32-style INI ko kowane shimfidar lebur). An kiyaye rubutun sashe da sharhi.
ini.specLabel: Tsarin fayil ɗin INI akan Wikipedia

restext.blurb: Microsoft MUI rubutu albarkatun — lebur {keyValue} nau'i-nau'i amfani a matsayin textual companion to {resx}.

roundTrip.heading: Garantin zagaye
roundTrip.body: Dakin gwajin yana tabbatar da zagaye na byte-for-byte don wakilan wakilan kowane tsari. Idan tsarin quirk ya karya zagaye-tripping a cikin codebase, don Allah {issueLink} tare da ƙaramin samfurin.

recipes.title: Girke-girke
recipes.lede: Alamu na yau da kullun don fassarar jigilar kaya: monorepos, ƙamus ɗin, nau'ikan al'ada, bushewar gudu, da sarrafa sauti.

pullRequest.heading: Buɗe buƙatun jawo bayan kowane gudu

monorepo.heading: Monorepos: fassarar scope a kowane kunshin

glossary.heading: Glossary don sunayen samfura da sharuɗɗan samfura
glossary.body: Ana amfani da kalmomin ƙamus {after} fassarar, don haka fitowar fassarar na'ura tana kiyaye alamar da kuka fi so koda lokacin da samfurin ya canza shi don ma'anar.

customCategory.heading: Custom Translator category (masana'antu / yanki)
customCategory.body: Horar da rukunin Azure {customTranslatorLink} a kan corpus wanda ke ɗaukar ƙamus da sautin masana'antar ku (shari'a, likitanci, tallace-tallace, injiniyan ciki, da sauransu) kuma wuce ID ta hanyar {categoryId}. Wannan shine mafi ƙarfin sautin lever da Azure ke bayarwa.

tone.heading: Kula da sauti + tsananin fallback
tone.body: Haɗa mai fassara na al'ada {categoryId} tare da {profanityAction} da {allowFallbackFalse} don tilasta murya mai daidaituwa kuma ya kasa aiki idan rukunin da aka zaɓa ba shi da ƙaddamar da ɗayan wuraren da kuka yi niyya.

dryRun.heading: Tsaftace gudu kafin kunna aikin
dryRun.body: Aikin har yanzu yana fitar da taƙaitaccen fitarwa da taƙaitaccen mataki, amma ba a rubuta fayiloli ba. Haɗa tare da {failOnErrorFalse} don nuna kowane batun a matsayin gargaɗi yayin da kuke maimaitawa.

faq.title: Tambayoyin da aka fi yawan yi
faq.lede: Amsoshi masu sauri ga tambayoyin da suka fi tasowa yayin ɗaukar matakin.

azure.heading: Ta yaya aikin yake magana da Azure?
azure.body: Ta hanyar Microsoft ta hukuma {azureSdkLink} SDK, layered a kan {corePipelineLink}. Wannan yana ba ku sake gwadawa ta atomatik akan {statusCodes}, ƙididdigar buƙata da samfuran amsawa, da sarrafa rubutun tabbatarwa kyauta - duk abin da ya kasance kiran {axios} da hannu. Yanayin aikin jama'a (shigarwa, fitarwa, fitarwa na fayil) ba a canza ba.

tone.heading: Me yasa wasu lokuta fassarar ba ta da alama ko kashewa?
tone.body: Fassarar na'ura ta kasa zuwa samfurin gama gari. Ƙuƙwalwar ƙuƙwalwa uku tana taimakawa: {glossaryLink} don wuya lokaci overrides, {customTranslatorLink} don samfuran da aka horar da su akan sautin ku da ƙamus, da kuma {profanityAction} don goge ko nuna sharuɗɗa marasa kyau.

duplicateFiles.heading: Ta yaya zan guji fassara fayil ɗaya sau biyu?
duplicateFiles.body: Kunna aikin aiki a kan {paths} da suka dace da fayilolin tushen ku kawai, misali {sourceGlob}. Har ila yau, aikin ya haɗa da nasa tatar fayil lokacin da aka saita {githubToken}, yana rage aiki zuwa fayiloli a cikin sabon alƙawarin.

offline.heading: Zan iya gudanar da aikin ba tare da layi ba?
offline.body: Ba daidai ba - Azure AI Translator shine kwakwalwar gudu. Amma zaku iya gudu tare da {dryRunTrue} don tabbatar da parsing da saiti ba tare da yin buƙatun HTTP don fassara ba.

node.heading: Wace sigar Node aikin ke gudana?
node.body: V3 yana gudana a kan GitHub Ayyuka {nodeRuntime} gudu. JavaScript ɗin da aka haɗa ya dace da Node 20, 22, da 24, wanda shine abin da CI ke gwadawa.

dist.heading: Daga ina {distDir} da aka haɗa suka fito?
dist.body: GitHub JS ayyuka suna jigilar JS ɗin da aka tattara a cikin ma'ajiyar. Aikin {distBuild} yana sake gina shi bayan kowane haɗuwa zuwa {mainBranch} idan zai gudana, kuma {distCheck} toshe PRs waɗanda za su sauka da fitarwa na zamani.

formats.heading: Yaya game da sauran tsarin albarkatu?
formats.body: Yau: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} idan kana bukatar wani — da parser dubawa ne kananan (parse → map → amfani da fassarar → format) da kuma gudummawa ne maraba.

translations.title: Fassarar
translations.lede: An fassara wannan shafin ta hanyar Mai Fassarar Albarkatu kanta, a kowane turawa zuwa main, zuwa kowane harshe da Azure AI Translator ke tallafawa.
translations.statusComplete: {translatedCount} a halin yanzu an fassara shi - cikakke!
translations.statusPending: {translatedCount} a halin yanzu an bayar da shi - {pendingCount} jiran {workflowName} na gaba.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Bincika ta hanyar harshe, lambar ko sunan asali.
translations.noLocales: Babu wurare da suka dace da wannan tace.

steps.source: Fayil ɗin tushen Turanci yana zaune a {messagesPath}.
steps.workflow: Tura wannan taɓawa yana farawa {workflowLink}, wanda ke gudana {thisAction} da kansa.
steps.fanOut: Aikin yana zuwa kowane yanki mai tallafawa mai fassara na Azure AI (wanda aka tsara a cikin {configPath}) kuma yana rubuta ɗan'uwan {messagesLocaleJson} a kowace manufa.
steps.pullRequest: An buɗe buƙatun janyewa tare da sababbin fassarar. Haɗa shi yana sake buga wannan shafin tare da katunan da aka cika.

translations.poweredBy: Powered by Resource Translator da Azure AI Translator.

contributing.title: Bayar da gudummawa
contributing.lede: Rahotannin kwaro, buƙatun fasali, da buƙatun jawo duk ana maraba da su. Aikin yana da ƙaramin isa ya zama abokantaka ga masu ba da gudummawa na farko.

steps.extension: Ƙara fayil din zuwa {translationFileSchemes} a cikin {finderFile}.
steps.tests: Write round-trip tests for parse → format and applyTranslations.

coverage.heading: Ƙofofin ɗaukar hoto
coverage.body: Tsarin Jest yana tilasta mafi ƙarancin ɗaukar hoto. Sabon lambar dole ne ya kiyaye maganganun + layi sama da 78% kuma ayyuka sama da 90%. Ƙara gwaje-gwaje da gwaje-gwaje tare da canjin ku.

docsSite.heading: Shafin takardu
docsSite.body: Babban fayil na {docsDir} shine aikin Astro 6 + Tailwind v4. Gudu {npmInstall} can sau ɗaya, sa'an nan kuma {npmRunDev} don samfoti na gida. Aikin {pagesWorkflow} yana jigilar takardun zuwa GitHub Pages akan kowane haɗuwa.

changelog.title: Canje-canje
changelog.lede: Babban taƙaitaccen taƙaitaccen bayani game da fitarwa. Canonical, canji mai iko yana rayuwa a cikin CHANGELOG.md a cikin ma'ajiyar.

releases.v302: {label} Translator buƙatun yanzu pin {apiVersion} a kan waya don duka {translate} da {languages}. Azure SDK kawai yana girmama zaɓi na abokin ciniki lokacin da aka wuce takardun shaida; Aikin yana tabbatar da buƙata ta hanyar kanun labarai, don haka an sauke wannan zaɓin a hankali kuma buƙatun sun ƙi zuwa sigar API ta samfoti wanda kwangilar ta {translate} ta ƙi jiki tare da HTTP 400 (lambar kuskure {code}). An kammala gyaran da aka fara a cikin 3.0.1.
releases.v301: {label} Jikin buƙata na {translate} yanzu shine jerin JSON na abubuwa {textItem} maimakon abin da aka nannade {inputs}, wanda ya dace da kwangilar v3.0 REST. A kan kansa wannan bai dawo da fassarar ba — duba 3.0.2.

items.runtime: Ya kamata a yi la'akari da lokacin da {nodeRuntime} gudu ({breaking}).
items.newInputs: Sabbin shigarwa: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, tare da maɓallin mai fassara {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker}, da {allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: Source locale yanzu kuma an tura shi zuwa ga Mai fassara kamar yadda {fromLocale} don haka ba a gano gajerun igiyoyi ta atomatik.
items.resilience: {label} sake gwadawa ta atomatik akan amsoshin HTTP na wucin gadi ({statusCodes}) wanda ke girmama taken {retryAfter} na Azure - ya koma baya mai ban sha'awa lokacin da ba ya nan. Tunable ta hanyar {maxRetries} da {retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: {label} alamu kamar {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} da HTML an nannade su a cikin sentinels kafin fassara kuma an dawo da su daga baya, don haka Mai fassara ya daina yin amfani da i18next / Mustache / Handlebars / .NET / printf placeholders. Toggle via {protectPlaceholders}; Ƙara tare da {customPlaceholderPatterns}. {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} sabon shigarwar {noTranslatePatterns} ya sauke maɓallan da suka dace daga buƙatar Mai fassara gaba ɗaya (yana adana ƙimar tushe don sunayen alama, lambobin kuskure, da sauransu). Matches glob alamu da parser-matakin keys (JSON dotted hanya, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF naúrar {xliffId}, INI / restext key). {issue}
items.tooling: esbuild bundler, ESLint 9 flat config, Prettier, EditorConfig.
items.docsSite: Astro + Tailwind v4 docs site with view transitions and Expressive Code.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} WCAG 2.1 AA wucewa. Logo glyphs canza zuwa hanyoyi don haka ba su ƙara kasa launi-bambanci a kan gradient tsayawa, da iyo {backToTop} button yana amfani da {inert} yayin da ɓoye (maimakon wani {ariaHidden} toggle cewa ya bar shi tabbable), {formatsAstro} sassan ba su sake karo da su atomatik generated heading IDs, uku locale katunan yanzu fallasa BCP-47-inganci {lang} halaye ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), duplicate {documentation} landmark labels are disambiguated tsakanin sidebar da footer,  kuma kowane teburin bayanai a kan {inputs} / {configuration} jiragen ruwa tare da rubutun mai karanta allo.
items.inlineCode: {label} Docs prose {codeElement} yanzu yana sanye da lafazin jigo mai dumi / amber - ya bambanta da alamar →alamar da aka yi amfani da ita don hanyoyin haɗi da kanun labarai.
items.automation: Dependabot auto-merge, CodeQL scanning, CI matrix.
